rows.label: qev085601_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, Elma. Have you seen Lao anywhere?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0002
rows.name:
No, I haven't seen him
in a while, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0003
rows.name: Were you supposed to meet up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Not exactly a meetup. We were
supposed to handle a joint mission
together, but I can't reach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0005
rows.name:
What, that's terrible! How
irresponsible of him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0006
rows.name: Well, I can't exactly argue with that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0007
rows.name:
But I don't think he means any
harm by it. Sorry, but please
don't speak badly of him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Why are you the one apologizing
when he stood you up, Doug-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0009
rows.name: Now that you mention it, you're right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0010
rows.name: Jeez, you're weird, Doug-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0010_2
rows.name:
By the way, you and Lao-san
are pretty close, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I was in the same unit with him before
we joined Elma's instruction squad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0012
rows.name: Oh, really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0013
rows.name:
I was the [System:Ruby rt=Pointman ]scout[/System:Ruby], and
he was the [System:Ruby rt=Sniper ]marksman[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Before the Coalition Government
was formed, we went to conflict
zones all over the place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0015
rows.name:
So you're what they
call brothers in arms?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Might be more accurate to
call it an inescapable bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Elma-san, how about we take on
the mission in Lao-san's place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0018
rows.name:
I don't mind, but is it
something we can handle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Yeah, it's not a mission that
absolutely requires a Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0020
rows.name:
It'd be a huge help if
you guys lent a hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then it is settled mo! Leave
it to Tatsu and rest easy mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0022
rows.name: That's reassuring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0023
rows.name: This is Nightglow Forest, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yeah. Since three days ago,
U.M. responses have been
observed all over the forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0025
rows.name: These are the locations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0025_2
rows.name:
It seems the analysis won't progress
with just Frontier Net surveys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0026
rows.name:
So we just need to go there
and collect data, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0027
rows.name: That would be a lifesaver...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0028
rows.name:
My team will handle half of
them, so I'd like to ask you
to take these three spots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0033
rows.name: Understood![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0034
rows.name:
We'll contact you once
we have all the data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0035
rows.name: Yeah, please do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0036
rows.name:
You won't just get the reward from HQ,
I'll treat you to a drink when it's over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_JNK0010
rows.name: Satisfaction

rows.label: qev085601_SEL0011
rows.name: Smile and say you expect a good place.

rows.label: qev085601_JNK0020
rows.name: Dissatisfaction

rows.label: qev085601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Shake your head and say you
prefer money over drinks.

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0037
rows.name:
Yeah, leave it to me. I've
got a special place in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0038
rows.name: I'll be looking forward to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hey, give me a break. You're pretty
greedy despite how you look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Come on, don't say that.
We'll work hard to earn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085601_MSG0041
rows.name:
If you say so, Lin, I
guess I have no choice.[ST:wait ]
